name: data-workbench
description: Codex plugin scaffold for the local-first Data Workbench.

interface.shortDescription: Run the workbench with Architect, Scout, Builder, and QA skills.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex plugin scaffold for the Data Workbench. It wraps the workbench's stable source-of-truth, plan-state, and review APIs and points each skill back to the checked-in playbooks.
defaultPrompt: Read /api/source-of-truth and tell me the next best task.
Use the builder workflow to resume the top open task.
Scan for drift and summarize the highest-risk contradiction.
